name: clickup-developer-reporting
description: Serverless ClickUp Developer & Team Reporting System

scripts.local:invoke:sync: sam local invoke SyncFunction --docker-network clickup-report_clickup-reporting-net --env-vars .env.local --event events/sync-event.json
scripts.local:invoke:daily: sam local invoke DailyReportFunction --docker-network clickup-report_clickup-reporting-net --env-vars .env.local --event events/daily-report-event.json
scripts.local:invoke:manual: sam local invoke ManualTriggerFunction --docker-network clickup-report_clickup-reporting-net --env-vars .env.local --event events/manual-trigger-event.json
scripts.local:invoke:backfill: sam local invoke BackfillFunction --docker-network clickup-report_clickup-reporting-net --env-vars .env.local --event events/backfill-event.json
scripts.local:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.localstack.yml down -v && docker compose -f docker-compose.localstack.yml up -d
